_description: Polybot v4.1 — multi-strike aware. ETH hourly is the only live hourly series as of Apr 2026.

ETH._comment: Hourly multi-strike. ~10 strike markets per hour, each Yes/No on 'ETH above $X at hh:00'.

BTC._comment: 4-hour multi-strike. Lower frequency — enable after ETH is profitable.

strategy._description: Late Entry V3 adapted for multi-strike. 'Favorite' = whichever side (YES/NO) of a chosen strike has higher ask.
strategy._comment_timing: For 3600s hourly: enter between 35:00 and 40:00 elapsed (1200-1500s left). For 14400s BTC-4h: scale accordingly or override per coin.

sizing._description: Bet sizes by time-to-close bin. Hardcoded max $5 in safety_guard.py.

risk._description: Soft caps — see safety_guard.py for hard caps

exit._comment: flip_stop_threshold: exit if our side mid drops below this (we're now the underdog)
